Home / Services / Blog Setup / Blog Authority

👑 Blog Authority

The ultimate blog launch package for those who want to build an authority site that dominates their niche. Everything in Blog Professional plus: 30 expertly written, long-form SEO articles (1,500–2,500 words each) targeting high-value keywords in your niche, a membership or gated content area for premium subscribers, a complete digital product setup (lead magnet PDF, tripwire offer, or mini-course) to monetise your audience from week one, advanced technical SEO audit and implementation including Core Web Vitals optimisation, a 6-month growth strategy document with traffic projections, content pillars, and link-building roadmap, custom illustrations or infographics for your top 10 articles, podcast-ready page setup if applicable, and a monthly check-in call for the first 3 months to review analytics and adjust strategy. This is for entrepreneurs, thought leaders, and businesses who want their blog to become THE go-to resource in their space.

Service Details

Category: Blog Setup

Credits Price: 2400 credits (approx. £3000)

Turnaround: 21–35 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 21–35 days
Book Blog Authority Now

Related Blog Setup Services

  • Blog Starter — Professional blog setup in your chosen niche with custom theme, essential plugins, and 5 launch posts. (400 credits)
  • Blog Professional — Advanced blog build with custom design, 15 posts, email capture, monetisation setup, and content strategy. (1000 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Blog Authority?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 21–35 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
